name: Blood Grenade
description: Both the hunter and the hunted must pay the blood price.

abilities.name: Throw Grenade
abilities.description: Throws a grenade at an area-targeted location that damages upon impact. Cooldown: 10. Mana Cost: 0. Health Cost: 75. Cast Range: 900. Effect Radius: 300. First Damage: 50. Additionally applies a movement speed slow and damage per second debuff on all affected enemy units.
